chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1991 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection as at A 2. For hearing of main case 04.12.2025 Mr.Adnan Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Harchand Rai, advocate for the respondent No.3 --------- Counsel for the petitioner submits that he will not press this petition if he is allowed to institute fresh proceedings for ejectment of the opponent/respondent which proposal has been opposed by counsel for the respondent. Learned counsel for the petitioner may institute fresh proceedings before the Rent Controller as fresh cause of action and the Rent Controller may entertain the said application in accordance with the law. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Nadir*
